title: popowia platyphylla
intro: Popowia platyphylla, also known as the Papuan poppy tree or Papuan popowia, is a plant species in the Annonaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis. Popowia platyphylla is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for its herbal remedies.
